series_metadata.series_description: Participant case files created to document the PCA Program and continued eligibility. Records may include documentation relating to the application, evaluations, taxes, income/expenses, employment verification, job searches, education, invoices, payments, status reports, banking, facility representatives, correspondence and any additional records and supporting documentation relating to the participant's participation in the PCA Program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records are maintained in active or closed status. Active cases are retained until PCA Program eligibility is exhausted and the status changes to closed. Closed cases are destroyed ten (10) federal fiscal years from the date of closure or after any auditing requirements are met. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Records are maintained in active or closed status. Active cases are retained until PCA Program eligibility is exhausted and the status changes to closed or after any auditing requirements are met. Closed cases are destroyed ten (10) federal fiscal years from the date of closure. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
